method.deploy: git ls-files -- .deploy-* plus filesystem byte sizes
method.assets: SHA-256 and sharp metadata for image files under public/
method.references: literal public URL/path match is confirmed; basename-only is candidate; absence is unknown, not unused
method.provenance: confirmed only for path contracts written by current ComfyUI/rembg scripts; Gemini village matches remain candidates
